intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.details: The biome is severely degraded. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or lost. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable specimen, though significantly diminished.

inventory_reconciliation.p1: Systemic Loss: Yellow pot contains only soil/debris.
inventory_reconciliation.p2: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected.
inventory_reconciliation.p3: Present: Pothos remains, anchored by the white rabbit figurine.
inventory_reconciliation.p4: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected.

plant_audit.p1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.p3: Stressed; minimal foliage remaining near the rabbit anchor.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark and damp; potential for anaerobic conditions.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in the central black pot, acting as a non-biological substrate.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: Presence of white cabling/wires encroaching on the workspace.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Minimal change; initial state already showed signs of decline.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-1: Stagnation; no growth observed, only continued degradation of the Pothos leaf structure.
temporal_deltas.current: Final state confirms the loss of all specimens except for the remnant Pothos.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. The lack of light (despite the LED) and potential over-saturation of soil has led to the death of the majority of the registered plants. The Pothos is the only survivor, currently exhibiting signs of extreme physiological stress.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a failed botanical environment. The 'String of Nickels' and 'Mexican Mint' have vanished, likely due to root rot or lack of sufficient light. The Pothos in the P3 pot is the sole survivor, though it is barely clinging to life. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment that failed to arrest the decline.
